generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Provides 3D point cloud data for object detection and tracking in the vehicle's proximity using Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures depth and RGB data for environmental perception using Intel Deepsense D435i depth camera."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CameraDepthData
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Continuously monitors ego vehicle speed via onboard sensors integrated into the lower-level chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedData
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Continuously monitors ego vehicle steering angle via onboard sensors integrated into the lower-level chassis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSteeringAngleData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR processed via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering before transmission."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance CameraDepthData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Depth and RGB data from Intel Deepsense D435i camera for environmental perception."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle speed data collected via onboard sensors and transmitted via ROS2 topics."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance VehicleSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time ego vehicle steering angle data collected via onboard sensors and transmitted via ROS2 topics."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks (position, velocity, size) generated from LiDAR point clouds via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Uses DBSCAN algorithm for LiDAR data segmentation to identify clusters of points representing objects."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ObjectTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implements Kalman filtering for state estimation of detected objects based on LiDAR point clouds."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Follows ISO 15622 for performance class I ACC (speed control based on lead vehicle distance)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time sensor data including ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), LiDAR point clouds, and camera depth data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, CameraDepthData, VehicleSpeedData, VehicleSteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed object tracks (position, velocity, size) generated from raw LiDAR data via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering."
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationFE
]

instance HistoricalVehicleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical ego vehicle state and object track data stored in an external SQL database for reporting and analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance SimulatedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated data generated via MATLAB/Simulink for complex system validation and ACC algorithm development."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular software integration and inter-node communication framework for onboard data exchange and ROS2 package development."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService, ReportGenerationService, DataStorageService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Development SDK for Jetson hardware programming, enabling onboard computation and sensor integration."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFE, ActuationFE
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation tool for point cloud processing, ACC algorithm development, and complex system validation."
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControllingFE
]

instance WiFiCommunication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Wireless communication protocol for inter-entity communication between Physical Twin and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataTranslationFE
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "External SQL database for storing historical vehicle and object track data."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bridges ROS2 (onboard) and Wi-Fi (external) communication, aligning message types and performing unit conversions."
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving path via 3D Visualization User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computation from resource-constrained Physical Twin to Digital Twin, computing desired speed based on lead vehicle distance."
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCOptimizationInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to remotely enable/disable ACC, modify desired speed, and issue emergency braking commands via Control Panel User Interface."
    DTDFVocab:provides RemoteControlAction, ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance ReportGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalReportInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores ego vehicle state and object track data in an external SQL database."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataPersistenceInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state, object tracks, and projected driving path for monitoring and decision-making."
]

instance ACCOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Performance analytics for ACC optimization based on real-time and historical data."
]

instance RemoteControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enabling/disabling of ACC, modification of desired speed, and issuance of emergency braking commands."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HistoricalReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data for analysis."
]

instance DataPersistenceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Storage of historical vehicle and object track data in external SQL database for long-term analysis."
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Anomalies in sensor data or actuator behavior triggering alerts for predictive maintenance."
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote adjustment of ACC parameters (desired speed, braking thresholds) based on real-time monitoring data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OperationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of projected driving paths and object tracks aiding in route planning and safety-critical decision-making."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Converts desired speed commands into motor voltage commands via Vedder Electronic Speed Controller."
]

instance SteeringServoActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controls the steering angle of the vehicle through a servo mechanism integrated into the lower-level chassis."
]

// C1: Components (Functional Entities)
instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosted on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, performs point cloud clustering and object tracking using DBSCAN and Kalman filtering."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEnvironment
]

instance DataCollectionFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Collects real-time sensor data (vehicle state, object tracks) from Physical Twin via ROS2 topics."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance ACCControllingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Hosted in Digital Twin, computes desired speed based on lead vehicle distance using ISO 15622 ACC standards."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance ReportingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Generates human-readable reports of object tracks and vehicle state as time-series data."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance DataStorageFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Stores ego vehicle state and object track data in external SQL database."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance ActuationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Executes motor and steering control commands on NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano via ROS2 nodes."
    base:isContainedIn PhysicalTwinEnvironment
]

instance DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Bridges ROS2 (onboard) and Wi-Fi (external) communication, ensuring interoperability between Physical Twin and Digital Twin."
    base:isContainedIn DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Custom UI for real-time monitoring of vehicle state and object tracks."
    base:isContainedIn UserEntityEnvironment
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface for remote management of ACC (enable/disable, speed modification, emergency braking)."
    base:isContainedIn UserEntityEnvironment
]

// C1: Environments
instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataPreProcessingFE, ActuationFE, HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iCamera,
                 VehicleSpeedSensor, VehicleSteeringAngleSensor, MotorActuationComponent, SteeringServoActuationComponent
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains DataCollectionFE, ACCControllingFE, ReportingFE, DataStorageFE, DataTranslationFE
]

instance UserEntityEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ThreeDVisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The interactions from the virtual twin (DT) to the physical twin (PT) include:
  - **Desired speed commands** computed by the **ACC Controlling FE** in the DT, which are transmitted back to the PT for motor actuation.
  - **Remote management commands** (e.g., enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency braking) sent via the **Control Panel User Interface FE** to the **Actuation FE** on the PT.
  - **Actuation commands** are executed on the PT via ROS2 nodes interfacing with the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller** and **steering servo**, ensuring real-time response with a maximum latency of **100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time time-scale** with the following constraints:
  - **End-to-end latency** between PT and DT is limited to **≤100 ms** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185 for V2V communication).
  - **Clock synchronization** between PT and DT components is maintained with an accuracy of **±100 ms** (due to hardware limitations).
  - **Perception cycle**: Object tracks and vehicle state are updated continuously, with LiDAR data processed at high frequency (dependent on sensor refresh rates, typically **10–30 Hz** for LiDAR)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation follows an **entity-based architecture** adapted from **ISO 23247**, with the following orchestration:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts **Data Pre-Processing FE** (LiDAR clustering/tracking) and **Actuation FE** (motor/steering control), deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano**.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosts **Data Collection FE**, **ACC Controlling FE**, **Reporting FE**, and **Presentation FE**, deployed externally (cloud/edge).
  - **User Entity**: Hosts **3D Visualization FE** and **Control Panel FE**, deployed on an operator workstation.
  - **Cross-System Entity**: **Data Translation FE** ensures seamless data exchange between ROS2 (onboard) and Wi-Fi (external) networks.
  The constellation enables **computation offloading**, **real-time monitoring**, and **remote management** while adhering to **ISO 23247’s layered reference architecture** with deviations (e.g., addition of the Physical Twin Entity)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the following lifecycle stages of the PT:
  - **Design Phase**: Used as a **cyber-physical experimentation facility** for ACC development, leveraging **3D CAD design** and simulators (e.g., MATLAB/Simulink for point cloud processing).
  - **Operation Phase**: Enables **real-time monitoring**, **remote management**, and **predictive maintenance** (e.g., health monitoring of actuators/sensors).
  - **Validation Phase**: Supports **compliance validation** with ACC requirements (ISO 15622) and **safety-critical testing** via real-time data collection and simulation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Real-time synchronization**: Achieved via **clock synchronization (±100 ms)** and **low-latency communication (≤100 ms)**.
  - **Model validation**: ACC control logic adheres to **ISO 15622** for performance class I systems.
  - **Data integrity**: Ensured via **Data Translation FE**, which aligns message types and performs unit conversions.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Addressed through **Kalman filtering** for object tracking and **DBSCAN clustering** for LiDAR data segmentation.
  - **Verification**: Conducted via **real-world testing** of the 1/10th-scale PT and **simulation-based validation** using MATLAB/Simulink."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between PT and DT includes:
  - **Network Protocol**: **Wi-Fi** for inter-entity communication (PT ↔ DT) with **≤100 ms latency** (as per 3GPP TS 22.185).
  - **Onboard Communication**: **ROS2 topics** for intra-entity communication (e.g., sensor data to Data Pre-Processing FE).
  - **Data Translation**: **Data Translation FE** serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions between ROS2 and Wi-Fi-based communication."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed across multiple hardware components:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Deployed on the **NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano** (onboard the PT) for real-time sensor processing and actuation.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Deployed externally (cloud/edge) for computation-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC control, reporting).
  - **User Entity**: Deployed on an **operator workstation** for visualization and remote management.
  The deployment follows a **hybrid architecture**, with **ROS2** for onboard modules and **Wi-Fi** for external communication."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is limited to the scope of the DT system, with no explicit mention of external system integration. However, the architecture supports potential integration with:
  - **Other ADAS systems** (e.g., lane-keeping assist, collision avoidance) via **ROS2 middleware**.
  - **Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) communication** standards (e.g., **3GPP TS 22.185**) for future scalability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following standards:
  - **ISO 23247**: Reference architecture for Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, adapted for automotive use (with deviations like the **Physical Twin Entity**).
  - **ISO 15622**: Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC) system requirements for performance class I.
  - **3GPP TS 22.185**: Service requirements for Vehicle-to-Vehicle (V2V) communication, including **≤100 ms latency** and **clock synchronization (±100 ms)**.
  - **ROS2**: Middleware standard for modular software integration.
  - **NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0**: SDK standard for Jetson hardware development."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations include:
  - **Real-time constraints**: Ensures **≤100 ms latency** and **±100 ms clock synchronization** to prevent unsafe operational states.
  - **Remote operation safety**: Emergency braking commands are directly transmitted to the PT via the **Actuation FE**, with no intermediate processing delays.
  - **Data integrity**: Validated through **Data Translation FE** and **ROS2 middleware**, ensuring no corruption or loss of critical data.
  - **Safety-critical validation**: ACC logic complies with **ISO 15622**, and the system is tested in real-world scenarios (1/10th-scale PT).
  - **Human-in-the-Loop**: Operators can override automated commands via the **Control Panel FE**, ensuring safety in mixed autonomy scenarios."
]
